summary.shape_sentence: Failed opening spike into morning liquidation, followed by wide two-way repair and a late downside retest with a small close bounce.

goat.note: No visible star label; standout move was the post-open rejection from the 25150s into the 24790 area.

red_circles.behavior: No visible red-circle labels; bearish pivots visually aligned with the opening spike high and later lower highs.

green_circles.behavior: No visible green-circle labels; bullish reactions appeared near 24780-24800 but did not produce sustained trend continuation.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: No visible orange bank icons; inferred supply at 25150-25165 and 25040-25085 was respected.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: No visible blue bank icons; inferred demand at 24780-24800 was tested multiple times and partially defended.

time_markers.10am_blue: Rejecting from the opening spike and entering the strongest downside leg of the day.
time_markers.12pm_red: Midday recovery active near 25000 after holding the morning base.
time_markers.2pm_green: Afternoon pullback stabilizing near 24880 before a lower-high bounce.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed below the open after a late selloff and modest reclaim bounce.

takeaway: Failed upside impulse day: early squeeze trapped near the highs, then the session converted into broad bearish rotation with defended but repeatedly pressured demand near 24780-24800.
